subject: Mathematics
question_text: Let $$f(x)$$ be a quadratic polynomial with leading coefficient 1 such that $$f(0)=p, p \neq 0$$, and $$f(1)=\frac{1}{3}$$. If the equations $$f(x)=0$$ and $$f \circ f \circ f \circ f(x)=0$$ have a common real root, then $$f(-3)$$ is equal to ________________.

subject: Mathematics
question_text:
Let $$A=\left[\begin{array}{lll}
1 & a & a \\
0 & 1 & b \\
0 & 0 & 1
\end{array}\right], a, b \in \mathbb{R}$$. If for some $$n \in \mathbb{N}, A^{n}=\left[\begin{array}{ccc}
1 & 48 & 2160 \\
0 & 1 & 96 \\
0 & 0 & 1
\end{array}\right]
$$ then $$n+a+b$$ is equal to ____________.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: The sum of the maximum and minimum values of the function $$f(x)=|5 x-7|+\left[x^{2}+2 x\right]$$ in the interval $$\left[\frac{5}{4}, 2\right]$$, where $$[t]$$ is the greatest integer $$\leq t$$, is ______________.

question_text:

$$\frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{4 y^{3}+2 y x^{2}}{3 x y^{2}+x^{3}}, y(1)=1$$.
If for some $$n \in \mathbb{N}, y(2) \in[n-1, n)$$, then $$n$$ is equal to _____________.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Let $$f$$ be a twice differentiable function on $$\mathbb{R}$$. If $$f^{\prime}(0)=4$$ and $$f(x) + \int\limits_0^x {(x - t)f'(t)dt = \left( {{e^{2x}} + {e^{ - 2x}}} \right)\cos 2x + {2 \over a}x} $$, then $$(2 a+1)^{5}\, a^{2}$$ is equal to _______________.
